quicksight.analysis.tooltipitem.CfnAbout:
The tooltip.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.analysis.tooltipitem.ColumnTo.Description: The tooltip item for the columns that are not part of a field well.

quicksight.analysis.tooltipitem.FieldToo.Description: The tooltip item for the fields.
